parameters.name: group
parameters.label: Group
parameters.description: If there are input groups, specifying a group name in this field will cause this to act only upon the group specified.

parameters.name: angle
parameters.label: Angle
parameters.description: The threshold angle between faces above which the shared edge vertices don't share points.

parameters.name: dist
parameters.label: Distance
parameters.description: Sets the maximum distance between points when consolidating points.

parameters.name: maxtries
parameters.label: Max Tries
parameters.description: Max number of iterations when trying to consolidate points, in case the target point has already been consolidated.

parameters.name: removeunusedpoints
parameters.label: Remove Unused Points
parameters.description: Removes unused points not referenced by primitives.

parameters.name: gridres
parameters.label: Voxels Grid Resolution
parameters.description: Defines the voxel grid resolution used when consolidating points via the Spatial Grid Per Voxel method.

parameters.name: specifybbox
parameters.label: Specify Bounding Box
parameters.description: Enable specifying a bounding box when consolidating points with the spacial grid per voxel method.

parameters.name: bbox
parameters.label: Bounding Box
parameters.description: to use as bounding box when specifying a bounding box when consolidating points with the Spatial Grid method.

parameters.name: cpureadback
parameters.label: Copy Topology Info Back to CPU
parameters.description: Enable copying the point count and topology information held on the to the CPU.

parameters.name: bypass
parameters.label: Bypass
parameters.description: Pass through the first input to the output unchanged.

parameters.name: freeextragpumem
parameters.label: Free Extra GPU Memory
parameters.description: Free memory that has accumulated when output memory has grown and shrunk.

parameters.name: delinputattrs
parameters.label: Delete Input Attributes
parameters.description: Only output which attributes you specify in this helps isolate attributes into a separate branch.
